Nothing Trump says tonight can change that basic reality. https://t.co/JcgNuQzEsp

Todd Blanche is Donald Trump’s lawyer—not YOURS.

70 million Americans, including 2 million Illinoisans, rely on Social Security. But absent action, their monthly benefits will be cut by $450 in just six years.

We cannot allow that to happen. Today, I introduced the PROMISE Act, a bipartisan measure that would finally begin the https://t.co/mTSg3tO0q8

Threats against sitting judges are very serious.

I’ve always said: Violence is wrong no matter who it’s from.

Justice Kagan, Justice Barrett, and I just agreed on that.

I just met with President Trump's pick for Attorney General, Todd Blanche.

Mr. Blanche is at the helm of a weaponized Justice Department, putting President Trump ahead of the Constitution, the rule of law, and you.

It’s clear that Mr. Blanche has never stopped being President

Unless we act, Social Security will be unable to make full payments in just six years. I am on the Senate floor to announce the introduction of a bipartisan bill that would address this looming crisis. https://t.co/ibMJHAE9MM

Lindsey Graham and I were adversaries on many issues and nominees, but we were trusted friends.

His word was good. And I made sure mine was, too.

I just paid tribute to him, his family, and the long partnership we had on the Senate Judiciary Committee. https://t.co/i9MML6A7OX

These lands belong to every American. In the wake of these unfortunate reductions, I urge

This measure will bring economic growth to the region & surrounding areas, & I look forward to
I’m speaking live on the Senate floor. WATCH: https://t.co/eSJhR2TS7n

Lindsey was part of every important policy issue and an indispensable player in

A few final photos from my time at the 2026 NATO Summit, where I met with @SecGenNATO, @alexstubb, @NicusorDanRO, as well as many others.

Support for NATO is alive and well in Congress, and I will continue to work with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to ensure that our https://t.co/HOw8nXkn3S

The United States and NATO must support these brave individuals fighting to protect their homeland. https://t.co/4UymVc1riA

On my way home from the NATO summit, I stopped in Budapest, Hungary, to meet with leaders of its new government after Viktor Orbán’s loss in April.

I’m encouraged by Hungary’s decision to play a more constructive role in European security, including standing with Ukraine, and I https://t.co/vA6W6UH2eG
Great to meet Hungary’s new Foreign Minister @_OrbanAnita today who reaffirmed Hungary’s relations with the U.S., place in the EU and NATO, and support for Ukraine. https://t.co/GRjYeO5r2Q

Russia’s invasion of Ukraine was a clear sign of Putin’s expansionist ambitions.

Reducing U.S. military presence in countries like Poland and the Baltics provides him with a dangerous and unnecessary advantage in his escalating aggression against our allies. https://t.co/s9D8UFa8iP

Meeting with @ZelenskyyUa today was a powerful reminder of what is at stake as Ukraine continues to defend its people, its sovereignty, and the principles that underpin transatlantic security.

Congress stands with Ukraine and it is long overdue we pass either of the two https://t.co/VsaxsgrXVz

Since it was formed in 1949, NATO has been a force for peace and democracy.

I believe in NATO, and I’m here at the NATO summit with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to show our allies that America stands with them. https://t.co/eLLqTsrWnN

I’m with a bipartisan congressional delegation in Ankara, Türkiye, to attend the 2026 NATO Summit.

As Putin continues to wage his war of aggression against Ukraine and menace our Baltic allies, we must remain unified in our fight for democracy. https://t.co/x671ntxLlS

Today marks four years since the horrific shooting at the Fourth of July parade in Highland Park.

My heart still aches for Highland Park and the families who experienced this tragedy.

We owe it to our communities to pass meaningful legislation to address the scourge of gun

Happy Fourth of July!

Our founders adopted the Declaration of Independence and established that all men are created equal, a phrase that links together all those committed to liberty.

As we celebrate America’s 250th birthday, may we strive to make that vision a reality. https://t.co/rCZtO6zzs7

Naturalization ceremonies are patriotic, and I can’t think of a better way to begin the holiday weekend.
 
We just welcomed sixty proud new citizens in Illinois.
 
Congratulations, fellow Americans! https://t.co/3NhvIRR7ni

Stopped by Tillamook's ice cream plant in Decatur today for a tour and a sweet treat.
 
While our state is known for its corn and soybeans, our folks in Decatur are also churning out ice cream to meet nationwide demand. https://t.co/w7sFO72geW

It was a pleasure to visit and learn more about their dedicated team and the volunteer army that helps thousands each year. https://t.co/Q8x7p0mIlt

It’s up to Congress to finally deliver the bipartisan immigration reform the American people are calling for.

The Trump Administration just got the greenlight to terminate TPS without any judicial review to ensure that Trump officials followed the TPS statute, paving the way for this Administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants to countries where they are not safe.

This is a BIG step forward.

AI companies agree that it’s time to pass legislation to protect women and girls from AI-generated deepfake nudes.

Time to pass the DEFIANCE Act and open the courtroom for survivors to sue.

Last year, nearly one in four people who traveled across state lines for reproductive health care traveled to Illinois.

It shouldn’t have to be this way, but Illinois is stepping up to provide women the care they need in the face of Republican abortion bans.

Senators are in no position to judge the circumstances a woman faces when deciding whether to end her pregnancy.

That choice belongs to her alone.

Restore Roe. Protect reproductive freedom. https://t.co/TwGK01QDbq
